title: Tickeron Unveils TSM/SOXS Double Agent Trading Robot for Enhanced Market Performance
author: tickeron_community
selftext: **ORLANDO, Fla.** \- **June 3, 2025** \- [*PRLog*](https://www.prlog.org/) \-- Tickeron, a leader in AI-driven financial solutions, proudly announces the launch of its [TSM/SOXS Double Agent Trading Robot](https://tickeron.com/bot-trading/1980-TSM-SOXS-Trading-Results-AI-Trading-Double-Agent/), designed to optimize trading strategies for Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co., Ltd. ([TSM](https://tickeron.com/ticker/TSM/)) and Direxion Daily Semiconductor Bear 3X Shares ETF ([SOXS](https://tickeron.com/ticker/SOXS/)). This innovative algorithm leverages advanced Financial Learning Models (FLMs) to deliver robust performance in dynamic markets.
